{{CargoRelic
|name=Hoverboard
|class_id=21378
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is a skateboard with a 100%% head-turning rate, utilizing anti-gravity technology, allowing the user to hover and move in the air. It seems to require no additional power to easily perform forward, turning, and other operations. Its owner, Martin, is a high school student and has a close friendship with the enthusiastic Dr. Brown. Martin uses the hoverboard for a series of adventures, freely traversing the city and evading enemy pursuits.
|fame=44
|art=33
|fth=51
|civ=42
|tech=73
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
